title: Storage and Handling of Immunobiologics | Vaccines & Immunizations | CDC
text:

For rotavirus vaccines, the repeat dose should be administered after a 28-day interval from the invalid dose or at the maximum age for the vaccine dose (whichever is earlier). Clinicians should consult promptly with state or local health departments in these situations. Consultation with CDC is available when necessary.
